positive: A whimsical, stylized geometric animal profile illustration featuring a graceful woodland fox and a soaring owl. The composition is centered and balanced, with thick, clean silhouettes of the animals interacting within a stylized, abstract mountain range background. Utilize a limited, harmonious color palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, sage green, and cream. The style should be highly graphic, minimalist, and suitable for screen printing on textiles, achieving strong contrast and crisp edges. Composition: Vector art, flat graphic design, negative space utilized. Lighting: Even, high contrast, studio-lit.
